common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: get basic info of shops which have authorized to the partner.

request_params.name: page_size
request_params.description: Each result set is returned as a page of entries. Use the "page_size" filters to control the maximum number of entries to retrieve per page (i.e., per call), and the "page_no" to start next call. This integer value is used to specify the maximum number of entries to return in a single "page" of data.

request_params.name: page_no
request_params.description: Specifies the page number of data to return in the current call. Starting from 1. if data is more than one page, the page_no can be some entry to start next call.

response_params.description: A list of shops authorized to the partner.
response_params.name: authed_shop_list

children.name: auth_time
children.description: The timestamp when the shop was authorized to the partner.

children.name: expire_time
children.description: Use this field to indicate the expiration date for shop authorization.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

response_params.name: more
response_params.description: This is to indicate whether the list is more than one page. If this value is true, you may want to continue to check next page to retrieve the rest of datas.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/public/get_shops_by_partner?page_no=1&page_size=1&partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
